title: Women Must Dress
writer: Frank Farnsworth, Dorothy Davenport, Edmund Joseph
actors: Minna Gombell, Gavin Gordon, Hardie Albright
plot: A wife is devastated when her husband divorces her and runs off with a younger woman. However, she finds that she has a flair for designing clothes, and soon she's working as a dress designer and is a partner in a successful and f...
